programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: Some of the biggest film stars in history rose to fame during the 'golden age' of Hollywood, in the early and mid-20th century. We profile some of these stars who became household names.

programme.title: The Return of the Soldier
programme.desc: In 1916 England, a shell-shocked veteran returns home with no memory, forcing three women to confront the war's hidden scars and its impact.

programme.title: Within Sand
programme.desc: Set against the mesmerising backdrop of Saudi Arabia's northern desert, Within Sand tells the gripping story of Sanam, a Bedouin trader who is forced to confront the harsh realities of nature after a devastating ambush.

programme.title: Speed Kills
programme.desc: A wealthy speedboat racer leads a double life that gets him into trouble with the law and drug lords.

programme.title: Spitfire
programme.desc: Exploring the history of the Spitfire airplane in commemoration of the Royal Air Force's centenary.

programme.title: Hotel Salvation
programme.desc: Rajiv is forced to drop everything in order to accommodate his father's last and bizarre wish to travel to Varanasi to attain salvation. The trip that follows forces the duo to re-engage with each other and the world around them in this heart-warming comedy.

programme.title: The Giants
programme.desc: The Giants explores the intertwined fates of trees and humans in this cinematic portrait of environmental folk hero and gay icon Bob Brown who took green politics to the centre of power.

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pajamas
programme.desc: Through the innocent eyes of Bruno, the son of the commandant at a German concentration camp, a friendship with a Jewish boy on the other side of the fence has startling and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: A Sasquatch family roams the forests of Northern California for a year, navigating nature, survival, and encroaching human presence in this surreal, dialogue-free tale.

programme.title: A Woman In Berlin
programme.desc: In war-torn Berlin during April 1945, a former journalist seeks protection from a Soviet officer amid brutal occupation. Their uneasy arrangement evolves into a complex, forbidden bond shaped by survival, power, and the harsh realities of war.

programme.title: Rosenthal
programme.desc: On November 9, 1978, beloved TV host Hans Rosenthal faces a profound moral conflict as his hit show coincides with Germany's first Kristallnacht commemoration.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Bethlehem
programme.desc: Salvo and Valentino, from vastly different worlds, find themselves in a nativity scene in ancient Palestine. They must face dangers, including King Herod, to save the newborn Jesus and rediscover themselves.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: Some of the biggest film stars in history rose to fame during the 'golden age' of Hollywood, in the early and mid-20th century. We profile some of these stars who became household names.

programme.title: Hotel Salvation
programme.desc: Rajiv is forced to drop everything in order to accommodate his father's last and bizarre wish to travel to Varanasi to attain salvation. The trip that follows forces the duo to re-engage with each other and the world around them in this heart-warming comedy.

programme.title: The Giants
programme.desc: The Giants explores the intertwined fates of trees and humans in this cinematic portrait of environmental folk hero and gay icon Bob Brown who took green politics to the centre of power.

programme.title: First Snow of Summer
programme.desc: Alexander vowed never to love - until he meets lively Caro in the Vienna subway. Their bittersweet journey tests his fears, changes seasons, and shows him love means risking it all.

programme.title: Rosenthal
programme.desc: On November 9, 1978, beloved TV host Hans Rosenthal faces a profound moral conflict as his hit show coincides with Germany's first Kristallnacht commemoration.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: An aged, retired Sherlock Holmes deals with early dementia as he tries to remember both his final case and a mysterious woman whose memory haunts him. He also befriends a fan, the young son of his housekeeper, who wants him to work again. Directed by Bill Condon and stars Ian McKellen, Laura Linney and Hiroyuki Sanada.

programme.title: The Return of the Soldier
programme.desc: In 1916 England, a shell-shocked veteran returns home with no memory, forcing three women to confront the war's hidden scars and its impact.

programme.title: The Battle of the River Plate
programme.desc: A gripping tale of heroism at sea, where the British Navy chases a German battleship sinking Allied ships during WWII. The German captain scuttles his ship to avoid defeat.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers
programme.desc: Filmmaking legends Spielberg and Eastwood collaborate on a gripping portrayal of the WWII battle for Iwo Jima, focusing on the iconic flag-raising image and the tragic loss of life on both sides.

programme.title: Shanghai
programme.desc: An American man returns to a corrupt, Japanese-occupied Shanghai and discovers his friend has been killed. While he unravels the mysteries of the death, he discovers a much larger secret. Stars John Cusack and Chow Yun-Fat.

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pajamas
programme.desc: Through the innocent eyes of Bruno, the son of the commandant at a German concentration camp, a friendship with a Jewish boy on the other side of the fence has startling and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: A Sasquatch family roams the forests of Northern California for a year, navigating nature, survival, and encroaching human presence in this surreal, dialogue-free tale.

programme.title: Speed Kills
programme.desc: A wealthy speedboat racer leads a double life that gets him into trouble with the law and drug lords.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: Some of the biggest film stars in history rose to fame during the 'golden age' of Hollywood, in the early and mid-20th century. We profile some of these stars who became household names.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: An aged, retired Sherlock Holmes deals with early dementia as he tries to remember both his final case and a mysterious woman whose memory haunts him. He also befriends a fan, the young son of his housekeeper, who wants him to work again. Directed by Bill Condon and stars Ian McKellen, Laura Linney and Hiroyuki Sanada.

programme.title: The Battle of the River Plate
programme.desc: A gripping tale of heroism at sea, where the British Navy chases a German battleship sinking Allied ships during WWII. The German captain scuttles his ship to avoid defeat.

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pajamas
programme.desc: Through the innocent eyes of Bruno, the son of the commandant at a German concentration camp, a friendship with a Jewish boy on the other side of the fence has startling and unexpected consequences.
